svg.title: Benchmark overview for the option pricing library
svg.desc: Reviewer-facing benchmark summary showing IV scaling, PDE cost versus accuracy, macro pipeline stage budget, and concise measured callouts for digital remedies, local-vol extraction, and tree scaling.

text.font-family: DejaVu Sans, Liberation Sans, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Benchmark overview

text.font-family: DejaVu Sans, Liberation Sans, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Compressed reviewer scan of the repo's measured scaling, cost-versus-accuracy, and end-to-end stage budget story.

text.font-family: DejaVu Sans, Liberation Sans, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Built from committed benchmark outputs under benchmarks/artifacts and docs/assets/generated/benchmarks.

text.font-family: DejaVu Sans, Liberation Sans, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: 801-strike slice: 0.86 ms vectorized vs 352 ms scalar loop

svg.text: Measured max speedup at that size: 407x, with zero observed vol difference vs the scalar loop.

svg.text: 9.12e-04 -> 2.28e-04 while runtime rises 296 ms -> 1.06 s.
